description: NEW STRUCTURAL SECTIONS on homepage: 'Steelman Evidence Ladder' (4 tiers of evidence strength), 'Australia Validation' section with road/rail scaffold data (australia_roads_v13_updated.csv added), 'How to Verify This Yourself' (6 checkable steps), interactive formula calculators with embedded inputs.
